passives.desc:
Takes -50% damage from [Combustion], [Laceration], [Vibration], [Burst], and [Sinking] (rounded down)
If this unit hits with a Cracked [SuperCoin], it does not activate the target's [Sinking] effect (does not consume Count either)
passives.name: The Knight of Despair

passives.desc: Turn Start: if none of the swords on the field have [HelplessTear], apply [HelplessTear] to 1 random sword (once per turn; does not activate if a sword has [HelplessTear])
passives.name: River of Helpless Tears

passives.desc:
When Staggered for the first time, recover from Stagger next turn; then, gain 10 [Protection] and 500 Shield every turn
Summon Heart-breaking Sword, Heart-tearing Sword, and Heart-piercing Sword next turn
passives.name: Shared Sorrow

passives.desc:
Every time a sword pierces this unit, gain 1 [CollapsedPride], and [Protection] gained every turn is reduced by 3 while Shield HP gained every turn is reduced by 100
At 3 [CollapsedPride], this unit no longer gains [Protection] and Shield every turn, and instead becomes Staggered next turn and gains [WornOutKnight]
passives.name: Weathered Knight

passives.desc:
Turn End after getting Staggered for the first time: if there is a Sinner with 5+ [ColdBlackTear], uses an AoE Skill next turn
Turn End after getting Staggered for the first time: if all Sinners have [ColdBlackTear], gain [SignOfDespair] next turn
passives.name: Hollow Pride

passives.desc: When this unit is hit by ARCANA[TabExplain] SLAVE while it has [WornOutKnight] and is at less than 600 HP: does not lose HP below 5%, and kills itself at Turn End
passives.name: One Last Justice

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] If target has 4+ [Sinking], Coin Power +1
[WinDuel] Inflict [ColdBlackTear] equal to the # of remaining Coins
skills.name: Cascading Despair

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] If target has 4+ [Sinking], Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 20 or higher SP, Base Power +1
[WinDuel] Inflict [ColdBlackTear] equal to the # of remaining Coins
skills.name: Sharp Teardrops

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Base Power +1 for every 4 [Sinking] on target (max 2)
[WhenUse] If target has 1+ [ColdBlackTear], Coin Power +1
[DefeatDuel] Deal -80% damage and damage dealt by this Skill cannot Stagger the target
skills.name: River of Despairing Tears

skills.desc: [WhenUse] Inflict 1 [ColdBlackTear]
skills.name: Shared Sorrow, Dulled

descs: [UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] Deal fixed damage equal to ([ColdBlackTear] Stack on target x 6)% of target's max HP, then remove all [ColdBlackTear] on target

skills.desc:
Prioritizes targets with the most [ColdBlackTear]
[WhenUse] If the main target has 5+ [ColdBlackTear], Coin Power +5
skills.name: Violent Cascade of Hollow Despair

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Deal fixed damage equal to ([ColdBlackTear] Stack on target x 6)% of target's max HP, then remove all [ColdBlackTear] on target (ignores Resistances)

skills.desc:
Uses this Skill when an enemy uses Arcana[TabExplain] Slave, and when this unit does not have [CollapsedPride]
Counterattacks only Arcana Slave
skills.name: Arcana: Tear and Pierce

passives.desc: If a sword with [HelplessTear] reaches 0 HP, it stabs the Knight of Despair[TabExplain]; then, transfers its Fatal Resistance value to 1 other random Sword next turn
passives.name: Despair-piercing Sword

passives.desc: If this unit hits with a Cracked [SuperCoin], it does not activate the target's [Sinking] effect
passives.name: Sword of a Forgotten Knight

passives.desc: If there is an enemy with [ChasingArcana], prioritizes that unit
passives.name: The Sword Points Toward Those Who Could Not be Protected

passives.desc:
This unit's HP does not drop below 1 when it does not have [HelplessTear]
Turn End: if this unit's HP drops to 1 when it does not have [HelplessTear], heals back to full HP
passives.name: Respite

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Clash Power +1 for every 4 [Sinking] on target (max 2)
[WhenUse] If target has 10 or higher SP, Base Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 20 or higher SP, Coin Power +1
skills.name: Faded Faith

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Clash Power +1 for every 4 [Sinking] on target (max 2)
[WhenUse] If target has 10 or higher SP, Base Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 20 or higher SP, Coin Power +1
skills.name: Weathered Pride

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Clash Power +1 for every 4 [Sinking] on target (max 2)
[WhenUse] If target has 10 or higher SP, Base Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 20 or higher SP, Coin Power +1
skills.name: Endless Despair

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] If target has 6+ [Sinking], inflict ([Sinking] on target / 10) [DefenseDown] next turn (rounded down)

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Coin Power +5 for every 6 [Sinking] on target (max 10)
[WhenUse] If target has [ColdBlackTear], Final Power +1
skills.name: Sword Sharpened with Tears

descs:
[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] Deal bonus Gloom damage equal to (Skill Power)% of target's max HP (max 30)
- If target has 2+ [ColdBlackTear], deal bonus Gloom damage again

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Coin Power +3 for every 6 [Sinking] on target (max 6)
[WhenUse] Base Power +1 for every [ColdBlackTear] Count on target (max 3)
skills.name: Sword Laced with Grief

passives.name: Despair-piercing Sword
